title: These anti trans bills are huge threats to civil liberties and we should do... - Random stuff - Fedia
text:
[taylorlorenz],These anti trans bills are huge threats to civil liberties and we should do everything in our power to fight them
[https://www.erininthemorning.com/p/nancy-maces-federal-trans-bathroom]
[loran_hayden],
[AndrewMettier],
[AinsleyLowbeer],
[@taylorlorenz]Nancy Mace is her own punishment.
[neekeeteen],
[@taylorlorenz]genuinely asking, how do you determine that a ‘real trans-person’ would use a bathroom and not some pervert that ‘pretends’ to be the ‘real trans-person’?
[wesdym],
[@taylorlorenz]Just to be clear, Mace isn't really a true believer in the way this might suggest. She IS a bigot, but in the garden-variety, "I don't like anything or anyone I don't understand, which is a LOT, and I find queer people icky and don't give a shit about anyone buy myself." This is all about her 'brand', because she's a useless turd and this is how you get good political work in a backwards place like South Carolina.
[boomer_michael],
[@taylorlorenz]Mace is[#SuckingUp247]
[AlgoCompSynth],
[@taylorlorenz]All I can say is that Mitch McConnell was right. When Democrats wanted to eliminate the filibuster to push through progressive legislation, he said something along the lines of, "Some day, you'll wish you still had it." That day may be next year when fascist bills like this ooze out of the House and the only way they can be stopped is by a filibuster.
[TruthSeeker54],
[@taylorlorenz]What did a trans person ever do to her to elicit so much hate and vileness? She’s utterly sick with it. If she thinks she’s a good Christian she’s greatly mistaken.
[BassRck66],"We need to BAN Nancy Mace!"
Oh, & "tiny" Mike Johnson!)
[Impish4249],If this "doesn't apply" to you:
First they came for the Communists
And I did not speak out
Because I was not a CommunistThen they came for the Socialists
And I did not speak out
Because I was not a SocialistThen they came for the trade unionists
And I did not speak out
Because I was not a trade unionistThen they came for the Jews
And I did not speak out
Because I was not a JewThen they came for me
And there was no one left
To speak out for me
[jm101],
[DePingus],
[@taylorlorenz]How do we know Nancy Mace isn't secretly trans? Someone needs to stand guard at Congress's bathrooms and not allow them, or anyone else, entry unless they show their genitals.
[AnOldGuy],
[@taylorlorenz]Being obsessed with the equipment of another human being inside a shared bathroom is creepy. GOP are creepy..
